title: cli-opencode permissions matrix
description: Structured pre-tool-call permissions matrix for cli-opencode deep-loop dispatches. Resolution semantics: rules are evaluated by operation_class and target_glob; the most-specific matching glob wins, where specificity is longer literal prefix plus fewer wildcards, and the first rule in rules[] breaks exact ties. Empty or malformed matrices default-deny at runtime.

version.description: Permissions matrix schema version. Phase 003 ships version 1.0.

description.description: Human-readable matrix purpose and resolution notes.

rules.description: Permission rules. Runtime selection uses most-specific glob wins; first-in-array breaks equal-specificity ties.

target_glob.description: Glob for the tool target. File operations use path globs; Bash operations use Exec(<command>) targets such as Exec(rg) or Exec(rm).

operation_class.description: Normalized operation class derived from the tool call.

scope.description: Authoring scope label for audit and migration review.

effect.description: Decision applied when this rule is the most-specific match.

rationale.description: Audit explanation included in deny reasons.
